name: alchemist-backend
description: AWS backend for Alchemist Business OS (1145 AI) — CDK serverless

scripts.check:contract: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('node_modules/@alchemist/contracts/package.json','utf8')).version;if(v!=='0.1.0'){console.error('contract version drift: expected 0.1.0, got '+v);process.exit(1)}console.log('@alchemist/contracts '+v+' OK')"
scripts.pretest: npm run check:contract && npm run check:fixtures
